query: SELECT p.id, p.userId, p.fullName, p.passportImageUrl, r.id as regId, r.userId as regUserId FROM passport_info p LEFT JOIN registrations r ON UPPER(p.fullName) = UPPER(r.name) WHERE p.passportImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND p.passportImageUrl != '' LIMIT 5;
